workflow.name: Create a Weathered PBR Material
workflow.description: Build a physically-based material with base color, roughness, normal, and weathering effects using material parameter instances for runtime tweaking.
intentPatterns: make a PBR material with wear
prerequisites: Base color, normal, and roughness texture assets imported

steps.purpose: Import base color texture if not already present
Assign base color texture to the material
Add a scalar parameter for weathering intensity (0-1)
Add a vector parameter for tint color override
Create a Material Instance for per-actor customization
Set default weathering intensity on the instance

workflow.expectedOutcome: A PBR material with weathering controls exposed as parameters, plus a Material Instance ready for per-actor customization
